title: Steven Spielberg Argued With THIS UFO Researcher About How Aliens Should Be Portrayed

transcript.text: jacqu valet might be the most preeminent
UFO researcher in the world in fact he
was Steven Spielberg's inspiration for
The Eccentric French scientist played by
Francois trufo in Close Encounters of
the Third Kind yeah nobody's really
replaced him at that level and
especially hypotheses that are even a
little more testable but what the
average person might not know about
jacqu is that he's obsessed with time
travel in fact on the set of Close
Encounters he got into an argument with
Steven Spielberg and we had a long
discussion about what UFOs could be and
of course for him the the main point of
the of the movie was entertainment and
it was appropriate for the UFOs to be
extraterrestrial visitors jacqu wanted
the UFOs and the aliens in the movie to
be represented in a more nuanced way and
actually linked with time travel not
just space travel I think that the
Extraterrestrial hypothesis is actually
more far-fetched
